welcome.title: Welcome to V&M Balance! 👋
welcome.description: This short guide will show you the key features of the app. Let's get started!

summaryCards.title: Financial Overview 📊
summaryCards.description: Here you can see your total income, expenses, and current balance. Click on the cards for details.

addTransaction.title: Add Transactions ➕
addTransaction.description: Use these buttons to quickly add income, expenses, or transfers between accounts.

paymentSources.title: Payment Sources 💳
paymentSources.description: Manage your bank accounts, cards, and cash. Track the balance on each source.

transactions.title: Transaction List 📋
transactions.description: All your transactions in one place. Use filters for easier searching and select multiple transactions for bulk editing.

aiAssistant.title: AI Financial Assistant 🤖
aiAssistant.description: Your personal financial advisor! Ask questions about spending, get savings tips, and analyze your finances.

help.title: User Guide
help.intro: V&M Balance is an app for tracking personal finances. Here's how to use it:
help.addTransactionsStep1: Click the '+' button in the top right corner
help.addTransactionsStep2: Choose type: Income, Expense or Transfer
help.addTransactionsStep3: Enter amount, description, category and date
help.addTransactionsStep4: For expenses you can also add a receipt photo
help.transfersStep1: Transfers track money movements between your payment sources
help.transfersStep2: E.g. transfer from bank account to cash
help.transfersStep3: Transfers don't affect total balance - they only redistribute funds
help.paymentSourcesStep1: Create payment sources like: Salary, Cash, Revolut, etc.
help.paymentSourcesStep2: Each source has its own balance that updates automatically
help.paymentSourcesStep3: Income increases source balance, expenses decrease it
help.paymentSourcesStep4: Click on a source to see all related transactions
help.paymentSourcesStep5: Click the 'My Accounts' card for full view
help.sharedAccountsStep1: Share payment sources with other users
help.sharedAccountsStep2: Click the members icon (👥) on a payment source
help.sharedAccountsStep4: Members can add transactions to the shared account
help.sharedAccountsStep5: Comment on transactions by clicking the comment icon (💬)
help.categoriesStep1: Use built-in categories or create your own
help.categoriesStep2: Categories help track spending by groups
help.categoriesStep3: Click on a category to see all transactions in it
help.categoriesStep4: Create custom categories in the 'Custom Categories' section
help.projectsStep1: Create projects to track specific expenses
help.projectsStep2: Each project has a budget, milestones and timeline
help.projectsStep3: Add workers and track work hours per project
help.projectsStep4: Invite team members to collaborate on a project
help.budgetsStep4: Receive notifications when approaching or exceeding limits
help.installmentsStep2: Enter total amount, number of installments and first payment date
help.installmentsStep3: The app automatically generates the payment schedule
help.installmentsStep4: Remaining obligations reduce your Net Worth
help.filtersStep1: Filter transactions by type, category, payment source and date
help.filtersStep2: Use search to quickly find transactions
help.filtersStep3: Select multiple transactions at once using checkboxes
help.filtersStep4: Bulk change category, payment source or delete transactions
help.aiAssistantStep1: Click the AI avatar in the bottom right corner
help.aiAssistantStep2: Ask questions about your finances in natural language
help.aiAssistantStep3: AI analyzes your income, expenses, budgets and projects
help.aiAssistantStep4: Get savings tips and spending trend overview
help.aiAssistantStep5: You can enable/disable it in Settings
help.receiptScanningStep1: When adding an expense you can photograph the receipt
help.receiptScanningStep2: AI automatically recognizes the amount and merchant
help.receiptScanningStep3: The photo is saved with the transaction for later review
help.bankImportStep1: CSV statement import from most banks is supported
help.bankImportStep2: Click the 'Bank Connection' card on the home page
help.bankImportStep3: Select the CSV file and the bank it comes from
help.reportsStep1: Click the 'Reports' button for a detailed overview
help.reportsStep2: Review spending by categories and months
help.reportsStep3: Filter by date and export to PDF
help.notificationsStep1: Click the bell icon in the header to view notifications
help.notificationsStep2: Receive notifications about shared account invitations
help.notificationsStep3: Accept or decline invitations directly from notifications
help.notificationsStep4: Budget alerts arrive when approaching limits
help.tipContent: For the best experience, regularly enter transactions and categorize them. This way you'll have a clearer insight into your finances and make better decisions.
help.summaryStep1: At the top you see total income, expenses and balance
help.summaryStep2: Click any card for detailed transaction view
help.backupStep2: In local mode, data is stored on your device
help.backupStep3: In cloud mode, data is automatically synced
help.mobileInstallStep1: You can install the app as a mobile application

hero.title: Take Control of Your
hero.subtitle: Track expenses in real-time, control projects, generate reports for your accountant — all in one app.

testimonials.title: Loved by Users
testimonials.subtitle: See what our users are saying

t1.name: Ana M.
t1.text: Finally an app that handles both personal and business finances! The receipt scanner saves me hours every month.

t2.name: Marko K.
t2.text: We share a family budget and everyone can see where money goes. Game changer for our household.

t3.name: Ivan P.
t3.text: Project tracking and expense control are incredibly useful. I finally see where money goes on every project.

footer.desc: Your financial control center for personal and business finances.

s1.title: 1. Introduction
s1.p1: V&M Balance ("app", "we", "our") is a personal and business finance management application. By using the app, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please stop using the application.

s2.title: 2. Use of Service
s2.p1: You must be at least 16 years old to use the app. By registering, you confirm that your information is accurate. The following is prohibited:
s2.l1: Using the app for illegal purposes
s2.l2: Attempting unauthorized access to other users' data
s2.l3: Sharing your account with third parties

s3.title: 3. Subscriptions & Payments
s3.pro: Unlimited transactions, advanced features, priority support
s3.business: Everything in Pro + business modules, invoicing, inventory
s3.p2: New users receive a 7-day free trial with full access to all features. After the trial expires, access is limited to the Free tier unless you activate a subscription.
s3.p3: Payments are processed via Stripe. Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing period (monthly or annually). Annual plans include a 17% discount.

s4.title: 4. Cancellation & Refunds
s4.p1: You can cancel your subscription at any time through the app settings. After cancellation:
s4.l1: Access to premium features continues until the end of the paid period
s4.l2: Your data remains saved and accessible at the Free tier
s4.l3: You can export all data using the backup function
s4.p2: In accordance with EU legislation, you have the right to a refund within 14 days of starting a subscription, provided you have not significantly used the service. Contact us via email for refunds.

s5.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
s5.p1: The app is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or complete data accuracy. V&M Balance is not a financial advisor and does not provide investment or tax advice.
s5.p2: We are not liable for financial decisions made based on data displayed in the app, nor for data loss caused by circumstances beyond our control.

s6.title: 6. GDPR Rights
s6.p1: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
s6.accessDesc: Right to view all data we store about you
s6.rectificationDesc: Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
s6.erasureDesc: Right to delete your account and all your data ("right to be forgotten")
s6.portabilityDesc: Right to export your data in a machine-readable format
s6.objectionDesc: Right to object to certain processing of your data

s7.title: 7. Changes to Terms
s7.p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service. You will be notified of significant changes via the app or email at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

s8.title: 8. Contact
s8.p1: For any questions regarding these Terms of Service, contact us at:

voice.notSupported: Voice input is not supported on this device
voice.permissionBody:
The system reports that microphone access is not allowed.

On Android, check: Settings → Apps → V&M Balance → Permissions → Microphone → enabled.

In a browser: click the lock icon next to the address bar and allow the microphone for this site.
voice.serviceBody:
The speech recognition service couldn't start — this isn't a problem with your microphone.

Possible causes:
• no internet connection (the service runs online)
• Google's speech service is temporarily unresponsive
• the WebView version in this app doesn't support this method

Please try again in a few seconds. If it still doesn't work, open the app in Chrome browser.
voice.unsupportedBody: Your version of the app or browser doesn't support voice input. Please type the text manually — all other features work normally.
